relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: The second volume begins from all Jesus began to do and teach.
The risen one commands through holy Spirit before being taken up.
Forty days of living proof and reign-teaching prepare the witnesses.
Jerusalem becomes the waiting place for the Father’s promise.
Water baptism gives way to holy Spirit baptism.
They ask about Israel’s restored reign.
Times and seasons belong to the Father’s authority.
Power comes with holy Spirit for witness to the earth’s edge.
A cloud receives him from their sight.
Heaven-gazing is met by messengers.
The same Jesus will come as he went.
They return from Olivet to Jerusalem.
The upper room gathers the apostolic circle.
Women, Mary, brothers, and apostles persevere in one-hearted prayer.
Peter stands among about one hundred twenty siblings.
Scripture and Spirit frame the Judas wound.
Judas had shared the service and number.
The field of injustice bears a violent memory.
Jerusalem knows the field as Field of Blood.
Psalms give language for vacancy and replacement.
The witness must have walked with Jesus’ whole ministry.
The needed witness is witness of resurrection.
Two are put forward.
The heart-knowing Lord is asked to show the chosen one.
Service and apostleship are restored after betrayal.
Matthias is counted with the eleven.
